activation_mode.mechanism: kiro_steering_inclusion_mode: Kiro steering files support always, conditional, and manual inclusion modes

auto_memory.mechanism: Kiro does not have an AI-generated auto-memory system separate from user-authored steering files

cross_provider_recognition.mechanism: kiro_agents_md_recognition: Kiro reads AGENTS.md files from other providers in addition to its own steering files

file_imports.mechanism: kiro_steering_file_references: Kiro steering files can reference other files using @file syntax

hierarchical_loading.mechanism: Kiro steering files are project-scoped; no multi-level subdirectory hierarchy documented

providerExtensions.name: Inclusion mode frontmatter field
providerExtensions.description: Controls when a steering file is loaded into context. Four modes: 'always' (default — included in every agent interaction), 'conditional' (loaded when the current file matches a 'globs' frontmatter pattern), 'manual' (only loaded when the user explicitly requests it), 'auto' (Kiro decides based on relevance, similar to model-driven auto-invocation). The 'conditional' and 'auto' modes enable selective context loading to avoid context overload.

providerExtensions.name: File references (@path/to/file) in steering files
providerExtensions.description: Steering files can include references to other files using '@path/to/file' syntax, causing Kiro to inline the referenced file's content into the steering context. Enables modular steering composition without duplicating content.

providerExtensions.name: Foundational steering files (auto-created)
providerExtensions.description: Kiro automatically creates three foundational steering files on workspace initialization: product_requirements.md, tech_stack.md, and architecture.md. These serve as a structured project context baseline and are created by Kiro, not the user.

providerExtensions.name: AGENTS.md root file recognition
providerExtensions.description: Kiro recognizes AGENTS.md in the repo root as a steering source, consistent with the cross-provider AGENTS.md convention. Treated as a workspace-scoped steering file alongside .kiro/steering/ content.
